sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77605" key="pantepi/qumos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παντ-επίθῡμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n77605.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">παντορέκτης</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg008:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:30" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
